summary: The derived-artifact framing opens a path from conversational fragments to governed process surfaces.

items.text: Store a generation manifest beside each cached view: input hashes, generator version, model, prompt, component vocabulary, theme version, timestamp and validation result.
Use semantic change detection so comments or formatting in a source artifact do not automatically invalidate a view unless they affect its meaning.
Route generation through agent-pipelines with stages for source extraction, generation, sanitization, schema conformance, visual review and publication.
Publish generated surfaces into the wiki-as-cognitive-interface with provenance and version history so humans and agents share the same navigable representation.
